<Summary source="https://stockanalysis.com/stocks/hban/history/">
## Summary: HBAN Stock Price History (StockAnalysis)

**Source:** StockAnalysis – Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) historical price data

### Key Data Points Relevant to the Question

The article provides historical daily OHLC (Open/High/Low/Close) price data for HBAN. The most recent data captured in the article runs through **March 3, 2026**, with no data yet available for March 4 or March 13, 2026 (the two dates relevant to the question).

**Recent closing prices (most recent first):**

| Date | Close | Change |
|------|-------|--------|
| Mar 3, 2026 | $16.75 | -1.30% |
| Mar 2, 2026 | $16.97 | +1.01% |
| Feb 27, 2026 | $16.80 | -4.22% |
| Feb 26, 2026 | $17.54 | +1.50% |
| Feb 25, 2026 | $17.28 | +1.53% |
| Feb 23, 2026 | $17.08 | -5.16% |
| Feb 20, 2026 | $18.01 | +0.90% |

### Notable Observations from the Data
- HBAN has experienced a **notable downtrend** from a recent high of ~$19.27 (Feb 6, 2026) to $16.75 (Mar 3, 2026), a decline of roughly **13%** over approximately one month.
- Volatility has been elevated, with several days showing moves exceeding ±3-5%.
- After-hours on Mar 3, 2026, the stock was trading at **$17.00 (+1.49%)**.

**Disclaimer:** The article does not contain data for March 4 or March 13, 2026, so a direct comparison cannot be made from this source alone.
</Summary>

<Summary source="https://ir.huntington.com/stock-data/historical-data">
**Disclaimer:** The article content provided is largely navigational/structural in nature (a website menu/navigation layout from Huntington Bancshares' Investor Relations page). No actual historical stock price data was successfully extracted from the page. The content represents only the site's navigation elements and section headers, not the underlying data tables or figures.

**Summary of Extracted Content:**

The page is from **Huntington Bancshares Incorporated's (HBAN) Investor Relations website**, specifically the **"Historical Data"** section under **Stock Data**. The page is structured to provide historical stock price information, but the actual data (prices, dates, volumes, etc.) was not captured in the extraction.

The site's navigation indicates the following related sections are available:
- **Stock Data:** Stock Quote & Charts, Historical Data, Analyst Coverage, Preferred Equity Dividends
- **Financial Information:** Financial Results, Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Dividends, Credit Ratings
- **Regulatory & SEC Filings:** Annual Reports, Quarterly Reports, Section 16 Filings
- **Corporate Responsibility and Governance** sections are also present

**No specific stock price figures, dates, or quantitative historical data relevant to the forecasting question were retrievable from this extraction.** A direct visit to the page or an alternative data source would be needed to obtain HBAN's closing prices for March 4 and March 13, 2026.
</Summary>

<Summary source="https://www.barchart.com/stocks/quotes/HBAN/price-history/historical">
**Disclaimer:** The extracted article does not contain any specific price data, financial statistics, or information directly relevant to HBAN's stock price on the dates in question (2026-03-04 or 2026-03-13). The content is entirely a **general help/documentation page from Barchart.com** explaining how to use their Symbol Price History tool.

---

## Summary

The article is a user guide for Barchart.com's **Symbol Price History** page, describing its features and functionality:

- **Data Tabs Available:** End-of-day prices, latest trades, corporate actions, and (for Premier Members) a historical data download tab.
- **Data Range:** Intraday data goes back ~10 years; daily data back to 01/01/2000; weekly/monthly/quarterly back to 01/01/1980.
- **Member Tiers:** Free site visitors see 3 months of daily data; paid members can access more data ranges, download CSV files, and use additional tools like Mini-Charts and Pre/Post Market views.
- **Latest Trades Tab:** Shows the last 50 trades for U.S. and Canadian equities, with detailed sale condition codes for NYSE and Nasdaq symbols.
- **Corporate Actions Tab:** Displays stock splits, dividends, and earnings for U.S. and Canadian equities.
- **No HBAN-specific price data** or any stock-specific financial information is present in this article.
</Summary>


<Summary source="https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/HBAN/form-4-huntington-bancshares-inc-md-insider-trading-activity-233a27ae3ce0.html">
## Summary of Article

**Source:** Stock Titan (SEC Form 4 Filing)
**Date:** March 4, 2026

### Key Facts:

This article is an SEC Form 4 filing reporting a change in beneficial ownership of **Huntington Bancshares Inc. (HBAN)** stock by a company executive.

- **Reporting Person:** An Executive Vice President and Chief Compliance Officer (CCO) at Huntington Bancshares, based at Huntington Center, 41 S. High Street
- **Transaction Type:** Code "F" — shares withheld for **tax withholding purposes** (not an open-market sale)
- **Transaction Date:** February 27, 2026
- **Shares Disposed:** **2,525 shares** of Common Stock
- **Price at Transaction:** **$16.80 per share**
- **Remaining Shares Owned:** **39,872.633 shares** (held directly)
- The filing was signed by Rachel L. Lawless, Attorney-in-Fact, on **March 3, 2026**

### Relevance to Forecast Question:
The filing provides a **reference price point of $16.80 per share** as of February 27, 2026, which may serve as a baseline near the March 4, 2026 close price. The transaction itself is a routine tax-withholding event and carries **no direct signal about future price direction**.
</Summary>

<Summary source="https://www.daily-tribune.com/online_features/press_releases/huntington-bank-and-broadstreet-launch-25m-nmtc-fund-to-fuel-economic-opportunity-in-low-income/article_bba6c664-6226-5a16-ab30-f981d6780fde.html">
## Summary: Huntington Bank & Broadstreet Launch $25M NMTC Fund (March 3, 2026)

**Core Announcement:**
Huntington Bank (through its **Huntington Community Impact Capital** arm) has partnered with Broadstreet Impact Services to launch a **$25 million New Markets Tax Credits (NMTC) fund** aimed at financing economic development in high-poverty communities.

**Key Details:**
- The fund is **managed by Broadstreet** and capitalized by Huntington Community Impact Capital
- Focus areas include **job creation, healthcare services, and workforce development**
- The fund has already **closed its first investment**: financing the acquisition and renovation of a commercial property in Cleveland for **New Bridge Cleveland Central School for Practical Nursing (CSPN)**, a tuition-free healthcare training center
- The NMTC structure enabled **$1.8 million in low-cost financing** for the Cleveland project
- Additional support came from **LISC**, which provided NMTCs plus **$4.3 million in flexible debt financing**

**Named Sources:**
- **David Gibson**, SVP & Director of NMTCs at Huntington Community Impact Capital, expressed pride in the partnership
- **Steve Petsos**, Broadstreet President, emphasized the necessity of NMTC financing for socially impactful projects

**Relevance to HBAN Forecast:**
This article reflects a **community investment/CSR initiative** by Huntington Bank and contains **no financial performance data, stock price information, or market-moving disclosures** directly relevant to HBAN's stock price trajectory.
</Summary>

<Summary source="https://www.clevelandbrowns.com/photos/browns-begin-dig-at-huntington-bank-field">
**Disclaimer:** The article content appears to be highly repetitive, with the same sentence repeated dozens of times, suggesting an error in content extraction or rendering. The meaningful content is limited.

---

## Summary

The article, sourced from the Cleveland Browns' official website, reports that the Cleveland Browns **began mass excavation for the new Huntington Bank Field on March 2, 2026**, at the **Brook Park Construction Site**. This marks a significant construction milestone for the team's new stadium project.

The article also briefly references other recent team activities, including:
- **Behind-the-scenes coverage** of Browns coaches and executives evaluating workouts at the **2026 NFL Combine** in Indianapolis, Indiana.
- **Top prospects** speaking to media at the Combine on **February 26, 2026**.
- **Cleveland Browns Daily** broadcasting from the Combine.
- **Head Coach Todd Monken** holding a press conference at the 2026 NFL Combine in Indianapolis.

---

**Relevance to HBAN forecast:** This article contains **no financial data, stock price information, or analyst opinions** regarding Huntington Bancshares (HBAN). The mention of "Huntington Bank Field" refers solely to the stadium naming rights and is not directly relevant to HBAN's stock performance.
</Summary>

**Huntington Bancshares -Oh is trading -0.35 percent lower with a volume of USD 460.7 mn on Tuesday 3rd of March**
On Tuesday, March 3, 2026, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (HBAN) shares traded down 0.35% to USD 16.64, with a trading volume of USD 460.7 million, according to Stockpulse. The company's current market capitalization stands at USD 34.7 billion, with a total supply of 2 billion shares. Over the past 24 hours, the stock moved below its 200-day simple moving average of USD 16.81, while its 52-week range spans from a low of USD 11.92 (recorded on April 7, 2025) to a high of USD 19.46 (recorded on February 6, 2026). Since the end of the previous month, HBAN has declined by 1.85%. In related market movements, PayPal (PYPL) rose 6.74% to USD 45.8, achieving a market cap of USD 40.6 billion and a price-to-earnings ratio of 8.09. PayPal is facing mixed developments, including the integration of its platform with Sweden's Swish service, potential class-action litigation over alleged securities fraud, and speculation regarding a possible takeover. Strategy (MSTR) increased 0.73% to USD 134.56, with a market cap of USD 41.3 billion. MicroStrategy Inc. deepened its Bitcoin strategy by acquiring roughly 3,000 bitcoins in late February, financed primarily through new common shares, bringing its total holdings to approximately 720,000 bitcoins. Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) gained 1.94% to USD 650.73, with a market cap of USD 41.2 billion and a price-to-earnings ratio of 41.98. The company's stock recently closed at $696.85, having reached a 52-week peak of $710.97 on February 9, 2026. Microchip Technology Inc. (MCHP) fell 0.87% to USD 71.54, with a market cap of USD 41.5 billion. MCHP reported a markedly negative price-to-earnings ratio of –263.56 and a price-to-book ratio of 6.41, indicating valuation concerns despite an upcoming presentation at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on February 27, 2026. Huntington Bancshares is a multistate bank holding company listed on Nasdaq, offering commercial banking, mortgage banking, and investment management services.
Original language: en
Publish date: March 03, 2026 04:51 PM
Source:[Stockpulse](https://api2.stockpulse.de/newstex/778321414)

**BEL Dividend 2026 Alert: Check the New Record Date for Rs 1.95/Share Interim Payout**
Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL), a Navratna Defence Public Sector Undertaking (PSU), has revised the record date for its interim dividend of Rs 1.95 per equity share (face value Re 1) to March 6, 2026, up from the previously set date of March 5, according to a board meeting announcement. The dividend, declared on February 27, 2026, must be paid by March 29, 2026, in compliance with The Companies Act, 2013, which mandates payment within 30 days of declaration. This marks BEL's first interim dividend for the Financial Year 2025-26. In its Q3FY26 results, BEL reported a consolidated net profit of Rs 1,579.70 crore, an increase of over 20% from Rs 1,311.60 crore in the same quarter of the previous year. Revenue from operations for the quarter ended December reached Rs 7,153.85 crore, rising nearly 24% from Rs 5,770.7 crore in Q3FY25, and increased by over 3% sequentially from Rs 5,792 crore in Q2FY26. Profit rose nearly 23% quarter-over-quarter from Rs 1,287.16 crore. Additionally, the company noted a financial impact of Rs 1,662 lakh (Rs 16.62 crore) due to increased gratuity liability from new labour codes. On the trading front, BEL's share price closed at Rs 454.15 on March 3, 2026, up over 2%, with a one-month return of nearly 3.6% and a one-year gain of 76%.
Original language: en
Publish date: March 03, 2026 02:30 AM
Source:[The Financial Express](https://www.financialexpress.com/business/industry/bel-dividend-2026-alert-check-the-new-record-date-for-rs-1-95share-interim-dividend-payout/4160743/)

**Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) Short Interest Update**
Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN), a Columbus, Ohio-based bank holding company, saw several institutional investors adjust their positions in 2026. MTM Investment Management LLC purchased a new stake worth $25,000 in Q2, while MV Capital Management Inc. and Palisade Asset Management LLC acquired new positions valued at approximately $25,000 and $26,000 respectively in Q4 and Q3. South Plains Financial Inc. increased its stake by 116.3% in Q3, now holding 1,536 shares worth $27,000 after buying 826 additional shares, and Centennial Bank AR acquired a new stake valued at about $28,000 in Q4. Collectively, hedge funds and institutional investors own 80.72% of the company's stock. On March 3, 2026, the company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.155 per share, payable on April 1st to investors of record on March 18th, representing a 3.7% yield and a 44.60% dividend payout ratio. Analyst ratings have shifted recently: UBS Group set a $21.00 target on February 4th, Keefe, Bruyette & Woods lowered their target to $19.50 with a 'market perform' rating on January 23rd, Jefferies Financial Group raised their target to $22.00 with a 'buy' rating on December 19th, Stephens increased their target to $20.00 with an 'equal weight' rating on December 18th, and Evercore initiated coverage with an 'outperform' rating and $21.00 target on February 3rd. According to MarketBeat data, the consensus rating is 'Moderate Buy' with a consensus target price of $20.69, based on two 'Strong Buy', fourteen 'Buy', four 'Hold', and one 'Sell' ratings.
Original language: en
Publish date: March 03, 2026 01:44 AM
Source:[themarketsdaily.com](https://www.themarketsdaily.com/2026/03/03/huntington-bancshares-incorporated-nasdaqhban-short-interest-update.html)

**BTIG cuts Mid-America Apartment stock price target on supply pressures By Investing.com**
On March 3, 2026, BTIG analyst Michael Gorman lowered the price target for Mid-America Apartment Communities (NYSE:MAA) to $150 from $160 while maintaining a 'Buy' rating, citing prolonged supply pressures that have extended beyond initial expectations. The stock currently trades at $134.11, representing a market capitalization of $16.08 billion and a nearly 17% decline over the past year. Following the company's fourth-quarter 2025 results and 2026 guidance, BTIG projects that same-store net operating income will likely bottom in the first quarter, with effective rent growth moving positively despite weak new lease pricing. Mid-America Apartment continues to maintain high occupancy and strong renewal rates driven by demand trends. The company has raised its dividend for 15 consecutive years and maintained payments for 33 years, according to InvestingPro data, yielding 4.56%. However, the stock trades at a P/E ratio of 35.45, with InvestingPro analysis suggesting the shares are overvalued relative to their Fair Value estimate. In related earnings news, Mid-America reported a Q4 2025 EPS of $0.48, significantly missing the analyst forecast of $0.93, and revenue of $555.55 million, slightly below the projected $555.82 million. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.0625 per share on its 8.50% Series I Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, payable on March 31, 2026. Meanwhile, KeyBanc lowered its price target to $155.00 from $170.00 due to uncertainty in demand trends, while Citizens maintained its Market Outperform rating and $160.00 target, noting that Mid-America's Core FFO per share of $2.23 exceeded estimates and property operating expenses were better than anticipated, contributing to a higher-than-expected NOI by $1.6 million.
Original language: en
Publish date: March 03, 2026 12:00 AM
Source:[Investing.com India](https://in.investing.com/news/analyst-ratings/btig-cuts-midamerica-apartment-stock-price-target-on-supply-pressures-93CH-5268099)

**3 of the best ASX dividend shares to buy in March**
In March 2026, The Motley Fool Australia identifies three ASX dividend shares as top buys for income investors: APA Group (ASX: APA), Rural Funds Group (ASX: RFF), and Transurban Group (ASX: TCL). APA Group, which owns energy infrastructure including gas pipelines and renewable assets, guides to a FY 2026 dividend of 58 cents per share, equating to a yield of approximately 6.2% based on its current share price. Rural Funds Group, providing exposure to agricultural assets like cattle properties and vineyards via long-term leases, guides to dividends of 11.7 cents per share for FY 2026, representing a yield of around 5.5%. Transurban Group, operating toll roads in Australia and North America, guides to a FY 2026 dividend of 69 cents per share, yielding approximately 4.75%. The article notes that while agriculture has cyclical elements, structural support exists due to food demand and land scarcity, and Transurban benefits from population growth. The piece was written by Motley Fool contributor James Mickleboro, who has no position in the stocks mentioned, while The Motley Fool Australia and its parent company hold positions in and have recommended all three companies. The article was published on March 02, 2026, at 20:40.
Original language: en

**Ex-Dividend Reminder: H & R Block, Fox and Yum China Holdings**
On March 4, 2026, H & R Block, Inc. (HRB), Fox Corp (FOXA), and Yum China Holdings Inc (YUMC) will trade ex-dividend for their upcoming payouts, according to Dividend Channel. H & R Block will pay a quarterly dividend of $0.42 on April 6, 2026; Fox Corp will pay a semi-annual dividend of $0.28 on March 25, 2026; and Yum China Holdings will pay a quarterly dividend of $0.29 on March 25, 2026. Based on HRB's recent stock price of $30.62, the dividend represents approximately 1.37% of the share price, leading to an expected 1.37% price drop for HRB on March 4, 2026. Similarly, FOXA is expected to open 0.50% lower, and YUMC is expected to open 0.53% lower, all else being equal. In Monday trading (March 2, 2026), HRB shares were off about 2.8%, FOXA shares were off about 0.8%, and YUMC shares were down about 1% on the day. If the most recent dividends continue, the estimated annualized yields would be 5.49% for H & R Block, Inc., 0.99% for Fox Corp, and 2.11% for Yum China Holdings Inc. The article notes that dividends are not always predictable and advises investors to review historical dividend data to assess stability. The views expressed are those of the author and do not necessarily reflect those of Nasdaq, Inc.

**Bharat Electronics Declares Interim Dividend for FY26 and Sets Record Date of March 5, 2026**
Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL), a Navratna Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Defence headquartered in Bengaluru, declared an interim dividend of Rs 1.95 per equity share (195% of the Rs 1 face value) for the Financial Year 2025-26 on February 27, 2026, with a record date of March 5, 2026. Following the announcement, BEL's stock traded at Rs 454.70 on the NSE at 10:10 AM IST on March 2, 2026, reflecting a 2.25% increase from the prior close of Rs 444.70, while the company maintains a market value exceeding Rs 3.32 lakh crore. According to Trendlyne data, BEL has declared 53 dividends since August 27, 2001, with a total payout of Rs 2.40 per share for FY 2024-2025 (comprising Rs 1.50 interim and Rs 0.90 final). At a share price of Rs 455.55, BEL's annual dividend yield stands at 0.53%, which is below the aerospace and defence industry average of 0.77%. Regarding market outlook, A R Ramachandran, a part-time SEBI-registered Research Analyst at Tips2trades, noted that the stock is 'bearish on the Daily charts with strong resistance at 454,' warning that a 'Daily close below support of 430 could lead to a target of 400 in the near term.' The dividend is scheduled to be paid within 30 days of the declaration.

**Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages**
Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ: HBAN) has received a consensus recommendation of 'Moderate Buy' from 21 brokerage firms, according to MarketBeat Ratings. The breakdown of ratings includes one 'Sell', four 'Hold', fourteen 'Buy', and two 'Strong Buy' ratings. The average 1-year target price among brokers is $20.5952. Recent analyst actions include Zacks Research downgrading HBAN from 'Strong Buy' to 'Hold' on December 2, 2025; Raymond James Financial upgrading the stock to 'Strong Buy' with a $21.00 target on January 23, 2026; Royal Bank of Canada reaffirming an 'Outperform' rating and setting a $21.00 price target on January 12, 2026; JPMorgan Chase & Co. raising its target from $20.00 to $21.00 and assigning an 'Overweight' rating on February 9, 2026; and National Bank Financial setting a $21.00 price objective on February 4, 2026. The stock opened at $17.08 on Tuesday, with a market cap of $34.67 billion, a P/E ratio of 12.29, a PEG ratio of 0.73, a beta of 0.96, a 50-day moving average of $17.85, and a 200-day moving average of $17.06. The company has a current ratio of 0.93, a quick ratio of 0.92, and a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.80. Its 12-month range is $11.91 to $19.45. In its most recent earnings report on January 22, 2026, HBAN reported $0.37 EPS, missing the consensus estimate of $0.40 by $0.03, and revenue of $2.19 billion, below the $2.21 billion consensus. The company posted a return on equity of 11.98% and a net margin of 17.71%. Analysts expect 1.39 EPS for the current fiscal year. Huntington Bancshares declared a quarterly dividend of $0.155 per share, payable on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 18, 2026, representing an annualized dividend of $0.62 and a yield of 3.6%, with a payout ratio of 44.60%. Insider trading activity shows Brantley J. Standridge sold 5,830 shares at an average price of $19.14 on February 4, 2026, reducing his stake by 1.75%, and Kendall A. Kowalski sold 2,481 shares at $17.80 on December 12, 2025, decreasing her ownership by 3.35%. Over the past 90 days, insiders sold 50,145 shares valued at $929,885, representing 0.89% of the company's shares. Institutional investors own 80.72% of the stock, with recent purchases by MTM Investment Management LLC, MV Capital Management Inc., Palisade Asset Management LLC, South Plains Financial Inc. (increasing its position by 116.3%), and Centennial Bank AR, all acquiring new stakes valued at $25,000 to $28,000. Huntington Bancshares, headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, operates through Huntington National Bank, offering retail and commercial banking services, including deposits, loans, mortgage origination, auto financing, and business banking solutions.

**Huntington Bancshares -Oh trades 2.4 percent higher on Thursday 19th of February**
Huntington Bancshares -Oh (HBAN) rose 2.4% during a 24-hour period ending at 10:33 PM Central Europe on February 19, 2026, with the stock trading at USD 17.84. The company has a market capitalization of USD 35.5 billion and a circulating supply of 2 billion shares. In the past 24 hours, USD 488 million worth of HBAN stock was traded. Since the end of January 2026, the stock has declined 0.56%. The 200-day simple moving average is USD 16.76, while the 52-week high is USD 19.46 (recorded on February 6, 2026), and the 52-week low is USD 11.92 (recorded on April 7, 2025). Huntington Bancshares is actively developing a tokenized deposit network in collaboration with the Cari Network, a blockchain platform led by former U.S. Comptroller Eugene Ludwig. The minimum viable product is expected by the end of March 2026, with a pilot launch in the third quarter. This initiative reflects the bank’s strategic interest in digital asset innovation. ## Summary: Barchart Expected Move Tool Explanation

**What is the Expected Move?**
The Expected Move (also called Implied Move) represents the price range a security is anticipated to move from its current price. It is calculated either as **85% of the at-the-money straddle value** or based on a **one standard deviation (68% probability)** using at-the-money implied volatility.

**Key Uses:**
- Identifying support/resistance levels for stock traders
- Selecting option strikes for directional or neutral strategies (straddles, strangles, butterflies, condors)
- Particularly useful around earnings season

**Chart Features:**
- Displays six months of prior price activity plus expected moves for the next two weekly and monthly options contracts
- Highlights earnings dates (flagged in red if within 28 days) and market timing (BMO/AMC)
- Shows **Implied Volatility (IV)**, **Historic Volatility (HV)**, **IV Rank**, and **IV Percentile**

**Expected Move Table Includes:**
- Options expiration dates and days until expiration
- Expected move in both point value and percentage terms
- Upper and lower price ranges
- Total open interest and implied volatility per expiration

**Data Update Cadence:**
- Options data is delayed ~25–30 minutes, updated every ~5 minutes during trading hours
- U.S. equity stock data has a 15-minute delay (Cboe BZX data is real-time)
</Summary>
